llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 14.1 (Recognition of RCSD Employees) was moved up before Oral Communication. President Marquez stated: 'Do we want to move the recognitions up to. Oral communication? Sounds good. Yeah. Okay, so we would like to move item 14.1 before oral communication.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the agenda? So moved. Seconded. All those in favor?

items.intro_words: Good evening, everyone. Welcome.
Evelyn. Can you please do roll call?
So reported on closed session for May 24, 2023.
So reported on closed session for May 24, 2023.
And now again, welcome, everyone to. To another Redwood City School District board meeting.
And are there any changes to the agenda?
Can I please get a motion to approve the agenda?
We are moving on to item 14.1, which we've just moved up before oral communication.
Evelyn, do we have any oral communication? No, I'm sorry.
moving on to item nine, bond program consent items.
moving on to 11. School and community report.
moving on to item 12, consent items. Can I get a motion to approve?
13.1. Approval of SEVIs waiver for substitute teachers for the 2023. 2024.
13.2. Approval of Prop 28 expenditure plan for 202324
13.3 Approval of local interagency agreements to provide education and training to credential candidates.
moving on to item 15, board and superintendent report.
Sixteen correspondence. I know. Let's see.
Any other possible business suggested items for future agenda?
item 18.1, changes to the board calendar.
does somebody want to make a motion to. To adjourn the meeting?
